message:
test(fuzz): add fuzz_community target for louvain/label_prop/modularity (franken_networkx-qwtf)

Structure-aware libfuzzer target covering the community-detection API
surface: louvain_communities (parametrized over arbitrary resolution
and threshold, with deterministic seeds), label_propagation_communities,
and modularity with an arbitrary partition derived deterministically
from an Arbitrary seed. A LouvainLarge variant stresses the larger
ArbitraryGraph fixture through louvain to surface edge cases driven by
richer graph structure.

Partition construction packs 2 bits per node into an Arbitrary u64 to
assign one of up to min(node_count, 4) community IDs, keeping every
produced partition structurally valid (every node assigned, every
community non-empty). Resolution / threshold kwargs clamped to safe
ranges so the fuzzer doesn't drive louvain into NaN territory.

Verified: rch exec -- cargo check --bin fuzz_community compiles clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,3 +109,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_clique"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_clique.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_community"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_community.rs"
+doc = false
